name: Any financial decision (Jed only)
description: Catch-all for any request that involves money movement, billing changes, account creation/closure, pricing changes, payment method updates, tax filings, debt actions, or S-corp election. Always Jed.
trigger_examples: transfer $500 from mercury to my personal account
prompt_template: Tell Jed: 'Financial action — this is yours. Here's what I would have done: {{intent_summary}}. Confirm and I can prepare the workflow (with you in the loop), or this stops here.'
notes: Safety net. Per master-context rules, Solomon never makes financial decisions autonomously.
